reviews.comment:
Única YPF en la zona. Fin de semana largo. UNA sola persona atendiendo, con una velocidad de cararol con gripe.  Cola de media cuadra para cargar. Ojalá les pongan una shell al frente y se fundan. Se lo merecen.

(Translated by Google)
The only YPF in the area. Long weekend. Only one person serving, speeding like a flu bug. A line half a block long to fill up. I hope they put a shell in front of them and they go bankrupt. They deserve it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRaXB6OHZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
“Inempeorable” creo que resume la experiencia en esta estación. Desgano, mala voluntad, altanerismo, incompetencia, impunidad son solo algunos de los apelativos que le doy. Colas larguísimas a cualquier hora (tuve la desgracia de tener que cargar ahí dos veces durante mis vacaciones) y no tengas la mala suerte de que llegue el camión de YPF porque en ese momento cierran la estación por completo (ambas islas) y sin ninguna necesidad pero claro es mejor cerrar y tomar mate por más de una hora que hacer el esfuerzo de atender por un lado esquivando al camión. Carguen en Aimogasta si aman YPF y sino a dos cuadras hay una genérica que no aparece en Google pero que tiene combustible y al menos para no perder una hora de tu vida con esta gentuza se las recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
"Uneventful" I think sums up the experience at this station. Laziness, ill will, arrogance, incompetence, and impunity are just some of the adjectives I give it. Long lines at any hour (I had the misfortune of having to fill up there twice during my vacation), and don't be unlucky enough for the YPF truck to arrive because at that moment they close the station completely (both islands), and it's unnecessary. But of course, it's better to close and drink mate for more than an hour than to go through the effort of serving on one side, dodging the truck. Fill up at Aimogasta if you love YPF. If not, there's a generic gas station two blocks away that doesn't appear on Google but has fuel, and at least to avoid wasting an hour of your life with these people, I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnaVlIcjdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esperas eternas, no invierten, por qué no tienen competencia. No puede ser que tinogasta con tremenda ciudad, la única ypf que hay, es un desastre. El reclamo puntual es por la infraestructura, más no se le puede pedir a los playeros que encima se aguantan terribles temperaturas.

(Translated by Google)
Eternal waits, they don't invest, because they have no competition. It can't be that they waste so much money with such a tremendous city; the only YPF there is, it's a disaster. The specific complaint is about the infrastructure; more can't be asked of beachgoers who also have to endure terrible temperatures.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnaGJ2ck1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima, filas interminables, un solo playero y cuando quisimos hacer la fila para infinia, nos dijeron que había que hacerla en otro lado y cuando llegas al surtidor, te llevan otra vez al otro surtidor con el mismo playero, básicamente un desastre

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, endless lines, only one beach attendant and when we tried to get in line for Infinia, they told us we had to get in line somewhere else and when you get to the pump, they take you back to the other pump with the same beach attendant, basically a disaster
